name: midcentury-editorial

arch-hall.jpg.subject: blue arched catalog hall — receding arches, archive shelves of documents/appliances, white grid floor, one orange Nelson lamp, reading figure

blue-room.jpg.subject: cobalt furniture interior on cream — gouache/screen-print, striped lamp, mustard+orange accents, black ink objects

still-life.jpg.subject: ink+watercolor still life — cobalt bottles, orange cocktail/citrus, dense printed text page, loose gestural linework

arched-interior.jpg.subject: periwinkle arched interior, daylight — orange cigar lamps, coral armchair, gallery walls, patterned floor

writers-desk.jpg.subject: cobalt writer's desk by the sea — typewriter, handwritten notebooks, pencils, postcards, eye drawing

system.grounds: warm cream paper (3 of 5 images); the blue images are bright daylight blues, never black
system.brand_color: cobalt/cornflower blue as OBJECT and STRUCTURE color, not background darkness
system.accent: orange — the lamp; exactly one glowing thing per composition
system.technique: flat gouache/screen-print: limited palette, posterized shapes, visible grain, ink outlines, slight misregistration
system.composition: depth by repetition (arches), dense supporting detail (documents, objects), one focal glow, figures for scale
donts: clean minimal vector shapes standing alone

usage: Process these images (or any new drops) with tools/image_lab.py: `map` onto the brand palette (levels 5, boost ~1.05) + `grain` for hero art. Sampled palettes above came from `image_lab.py sample`.
